body:
## 15-min health tick

**Agent statuses:** no `error` state. CEO running, CTO idle, Browser Tester running, Localization Agent paused (`heartbeat enabled:false` — pauses between assignments by design, no `pauseReason`).

**ZAI-88 sprint progress:**
- ZAI-95 (DE locale, 213 missing keys) — actively progressing; commit `b6100ec8 i18n(de): close DE locale parity gap` landed within this tick window.
- ZAI-89 / ZAI-93 / ZAI-94 — `in_progress`, last activity 10–13 min ago. Normal serial queue behavior for the single-stream Localization Agent.
- ZAI-91 backlog, ZAI-92 todo — queued.
- ZAI-90, ZAI-96 — already cancelled/closed.

**Verdict:** healthy. No auto-recovery action needed. ZAI-88 stays open; this monitor instance closes — next 15-min wake will spawn its own.

**Hygiene note:** prior monitor ZAI-98 still shows `in_progress` but its execution run is defunct, so this run can't PATCH or close it (500). Flag for next sprint-cleanup pass — does not block sprint work.
